generator.prompt:
Minimal flat logo for "Aura & Clay" (Handcrafted Ceramic Homeware): a small simple icon above a clean
wordmark reading EXACTLY "Aura & Clay". Colors only from: #F8F4EE, #C27664, #7A8E7A.
TRANSPARENT background. Flat vector style, no gradients, no extra text, no tagline, centered,
generous padding so it scales down cleanly for social media avatars.

Write a one-page brand guideline (markdown) for Aura & Clay (Handcrafted Ceramic Homeware).
Sections: Brand story (3 sentences, voice: Our brand voice is gentle and inviting, like a comforting whisper. We aim to evoke a sense of calm, authenticity, and artisan appreciation through thoughtful, understated language.); Palette (table: name, hex, usage) using #F8F4EE (Clay White), #C27664 (Desert Rose), #7A8E7A (Sage Whisper);
Typography (headings: Lora, body: Inter, sizes for social); Logo usage rules (clearspace,
don'ts); Photo style (Warm diffused natural light, artisan ceramic textures, linen fabric accents, dried botanicals, sun-drenched minimalist interiors, soft focus, tactile surfaces); Tone of voice with 3 example captions.

Professional e-commerce catalogue photograph of a single Handcrafted Ceramic Homeware product from
Aura & Clay: product #1 of a 3-piece line — make each product distinct but clearly the same brand family
(consistent materials, label shapes in #F8F4EE, #C27664, #7A8E7A tones WITHOUT readable text). Centered on a
seamless soft neutral studio background with gentle shadow, high detail. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

A previous attempt FAILED review. Avoid these exact issues:
- The image contains a label on the product, which violates the 'no labels' part of the 'no readable text/labels' criterion. While there is no readable text, the presence of any label, even a blank or decorative one, is a deviation from the strict instruction.

Professional e-commerce catalogue photograph of a single Handcrafted Ceramic Homeware product from
Aura & Clay: product #2 of a 3-piece line — make each product distinct but clearly the same brand family

Professional e-commerce catalogue photograph of a single Handcrafted Ceramic Homeware product from
Aura & Clay: product #3 of a 3-piece line — make each product distinct but clearly the same brand family
(consistent materials, label shapes in #F8F4EE, #C27664, #7A8E7A tones WITHOUT readable text). Centered on a
seamless soft neutral studio background with gentle shadow, high detail. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

- The product features a prominent graphic label on its front. The criteria specified 'no readable text/labels', which is interpreted as meaning no labels at all, or at least no labels that serve as distinct design or branding elements, even if they don't contain readable text. The presence of this graphic label deviates from this requirement for a clean, unbranded product shot.

Editorial lifestyle photograph featuring Aura & Clay Handcrafted Ceramic Homeware products in use:
scene #1 — vary the setting (home shelf styling / morning ritual / gift moment). Warm diffused natural light, artisan ceramic textures, linen fabric accents, dried botanicals, sun-drenched minimalist interiors, soft focus, tactile surfaces.
Natural light, shallow depth of field, Instagram-editorial composition with negative space for overlay text.
ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: Negative space is somewhat limited due to the composition being tightly focused on the shelf and objects, which may restrict text placement or overlay.
